chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2789 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.12618/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 18.08.2025 Mr. Muneer Ahmed Turk, advocate for the petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. Mr. Chetan S. Kela, advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Qamar Raza Jaskani, SSP Badin. ------------- Qamar Raza Jaskani, SSP Badin is present in Court and states that he has completed the inquiry in respect of Mst. Naseema / Petitioner No.1. Petitioner No.1 is also present in Court states that she has not been kidnapped / abducted. With regard to Mst. Khattu, SSP Badin states that her statement under Section 164 Cr.P.C shall be recorded tomorrow, thereafter, he shall file his report in appropriate class strictly in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
